zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Helen Mosson於1429年出生在英國藍卡爾霍格頓時，她的父親Thomas Mosson20歲，母親Sarah De Bothe17歲。她於1449年與Sir Henry Hoghton在英國藍卡爾霍格頓 堂爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1468年在英國藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾享年39歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Helen Mosson于1429年出生在英国藍卡爾霍格頓时，她的父亲Thomas Mosson20岁，母亲Sarah De Bothe17岁。她于1449年与Sir Henry Hoghton在英国藍卡爾霍格頓 堂爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1468年在英国藍卡爾麗婭 霍爾享年39岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mosson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: in Gloucs perhaps a variant of   Mawson  . Compare Tacie Mawson, 1570 in   IGI   (Elmore, Gloucs); John Mawson, 1645 in   IGI   (Kings Stanley, Gloucs). Otherwise see (2).

2  English: variant of   Moston   with assimilation of the /t/ to the preceding /s/. Compare Jois. Mosson, 1620, Thomæ Moston, 1630 in   IGI   (Astbury, Cheshire); John Moston, 1637, John Mosson, 1673 in   IGI   (Prees, Shrops); William Mosson, 1669, William Moston, 1715 in   IGI   (Saint Giles Cripplegate, London).

variants.name: Mowson
meanings: 1 English: relationship name from Middle English * maugh, * maw, * mough, * mow, ‘a kinsman by marriage, especially a son-in-law’ + -son. See Mowe (1) and compare Mawson . Some of the following earlier bearers may alternatively belong with (2).
2 English: post-medieval variant of Mawson (2), with the vowel rounded to give Mowson.
3  English: post-medieval variant of   Molson   (  see  Moulson  ), if not vice versa.

variants.name: Moston
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Moston (Lancs), Moston by Chester or Moston Green (both Cheshire), or Moston in Stanton upon Hine Heath (Shrops). There has probably been some confusion with (2).

variants.name: Mossom
meanings: 1 English: (i) variant of Mawson , as suggested by John Mawson, 1723, Wm. Mosson, 1745 in IGI , Isabella Mossom, 1758 in IGI (Auckland Saint Andrew, Durham). (ii) alternatively, a variant of Mowson , or Molson ( see Moulson ). Compare Alice Mowson, 1663 in IGI (Durham, Durham) and Richardi Mowson, 1586 in IGI (Wrawby, Lincs), but in Durham Mowson could also be a variant form of (1) and in Lincs Mosson and Mossom may alternatively belong with (2).
2  English: perhaps a variant of   Motson  .

variants.name: IGI
meanings: English: perhaps an altered form of   Pritchett   or   Pritchard  . Compare Katherine Pratchett, 1654, Janam Pritchett, 1675 in   IGI   (Acton by Nantwich, Cheshire); Gulielmus Pritchard, 1675, Mary Pratchett, 1698 in   IGI   (Hatfield, Herts).

variants.name: Mawson
meanings: metronymic from a form of   Maude   2.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Helen Mosson was born in 1429, in Hoghton, Lancashire, England, her father, Thomas Mosson, was 20 and her mother, Sarah De Bothe, was 17. She married Sir Henry Hoghton in 1449, in Hoghton Tower, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1468, in Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Helen Mosson est née en 1429, à Hoghton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Mosson, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Sarah De Bothe, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Henry Hoghton en 1449, à Hoghton Tower, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1468, à Lea Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.Houghton, Lanc., England: Houghton by Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Helen Mosson 1429 in Hoghton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Mosson 20 und ihre Mutter Sarah De Bothe 17. Sie hat 1449 in Hoghton Tower, Lancashire, England Sir Henry Hoghton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1468 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Lea Hall, Lancashire, England und wurde in Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Helen Mosson è nata il nel 1429 nel Hoghton, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Thomas Mosson, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Sarah De Bothe, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir Henry Hoghton nel 1449, nel Hoghton Tower, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1468, nel Lea Hall, Lancashire, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Helen Mossonが1429年にイギリスランカシュアイアホートンで生まれた時，父Thomas Mossonは20歳，母Sarah De Botheは17歳であった。1449年にイギリスランカシュアイアホートン トウエルでSir Henry Hoghtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1468年にイギリスランカシュアイアレア ハルで39歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Houghton, Lanc., England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 허그h턴 비 워링턴
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Helen Mosson(이)가 1429년 영국 랭카실르 호그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Mosson(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah De Bothe(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1449년 영국 랭카실르 호그h턴 타워에서 Sir Henry Hoghton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 영국 랭카실르 리아 홀에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Helen Mosson nasceu em 1429, em Hoghton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Mosson, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Sarah De Bothe, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Henry Hoghton em 1449, em Hoghton Tower, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1468, em Lea Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.Houghton, Lanc., England: хоугтон би варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Helen Mosson родилась в 1429 г. в местности хогтон, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Mosson было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah De Bothe, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Hoghton в 1449 г. в местности хогтон тоуир, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1468 г. в местности леа холл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности ланкашир, Англия.
